texto: There are days you wake up thinking you can juggle the world between your fingers, and other days you wake up feeling the air around you intoxicates you to a point where you can no longer leave the premises of your bed. The nights in between, you shuffle between being a warrior and a slave; wondering whether you want to lose yourself to win the world, or lose the world to win yourself.
explicacao: Citação de Mohamed Kassem sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “There are days you wake up thinking you can juggle the world between your fingers, and other days…” articula vida, life-and-living, world em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
